ℹ️ About Us
ABOUT ZITMAP TUTORIALS WHO WE ARE ZITMAP Tutorials is an online learning portal built to give students structured, reliable access to course materials, tests, tutorials, and academic support — all in one place. OUR MISSION To make quality educational resources and course administration simple, transparent, and accessible to every student enrolled with us, regardless of where they are studying from. WHAT WE OFFER • Organized course content — notes, tutorial sheets, tests, and videos, sorted by term and course • A simple enrolment and approval process, so admins can verify every student before granting access • Transparent fee/payment tracking per term • Direct communication with the administration team through Contact Us • Timely announcements about term dates, deadlines, and academic updates OUR COMMITMENT We are committed to keeping your data secure (see our Privacy & Security Policy), keeping the platform easy to use, and continuing to improve the portal based on feedback from students and staff. CONTACT If you have questions about ZITMAP Tutorials, please reach out through the Contact Us page.
📜 Terms & Conditions
TERMS & CONDITIONS ZITMAP Tutorials Online Learning Portal Last Updated: 2026 1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS By creating an account and using ZITMAP Tutorials, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this portal. 2. ACCOUNT REGISTRATION • You must provide accurate and complete information when registering. • New accounts are reviewed and approved by an administrator before full access is granted. • You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential and for all activity under your account. 3. ACCEPTABLE USE You agree not to: • Share your account with another person • Upload, post, or share unlawful, harmful, or infringing content • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts, courses, or admin areas • Use the portal for any purpose other than your own academic study 4. COURSE ACCESS & ENROLMENT • Access to course materials is granted per term, based on your enrolment and payment status. • Admins may activate or deactivate access to a given term based on your account status. • Enrolment requests are subject to admin approval and are not guaranteed. 5. PAYMENTS • Term fees, once recorded as paid, are managed by the administration according to the institution's own refund and payment policies. • Payment status is visible in your account and may be updated by an administrator. 6. UPLOADED CONTENT • Course files, notes, tests, and videos are provided for your personal academic use only. • You may not redistribute, resell, or publicly share materials uploaded to the portal without permission. 7. ACCOUNT SUSPENSION & TERMINATION ZITMAP Tutorials reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, misuse the platform, or provide false registration information. 8. AVAILABILITY While we aim to keep the portal available at all times, we do not guarantee uninterrupted access and are not liable for any loss resulting from downtime, maintenance, or technical issues. 9. CHANGES TO THESE TERMS These Terms & Conditions may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the portal after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. 10. CONTACT For any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact the ZITMAP Tutorials administration team through the Contact Us page. By using ZITMAP Tutorials, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.
🔒 Privacy & Security
PRIVACY & SECURITY POLICY ZITMAP Tutorials Online Learning Portal Last Updated: 2026 1. INTRODUCTION ZITMAP Tutorials ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting the privacy and security of all students, parents, and users of this learning portal. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the specific technical and administrative measures we use to protect it. 2. INFORMATION WE COLLECT We collect the following personal information when you create an account or use the portal: • Full name, gender, and year of study • Email address and phone number • School and program of study • Payment records for term fees • Uploaded coursework, files, and any messages you send us through Contact Us • Basic technical data needed to keep the service secure (e.g. sign-in timestamps) 3. HOW WE USE YOUR INFORMATION Your information is used to: • Manage your student account and course enrolments • Process and track your term fee payments • Communicate important academic updates and announcements • Allow administrators to approve course enrolment requests • Provide access to course files, notes, tests, and videos • Respond to messages you send through the Contact Us page 4. DATA STORAGE & SECURITY We take the following concrete technical measures to protect your data: • All account passwords are hashed with bcrypt before storage — we never store or have access to your plain-text password • Login sessions use signed JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication, valid for a limited time, rather than storing your password in the browser • Student and admin records are stored in a managed PostgreSQL database, not a plain file — with proper access controls and no public access • Repeated failed login or registration attempts are automatically rate-limited to protect against password-guessing attacks • Administrator accounts are assigned specific roles (e.g. Super Admin, Course Manager, Finance Admin, Student Manager), each restricted — at the server level, not just in the interface — to only the areas of the system relevant to their job. A Finance Admin, for example, cannot access or modify course content, and a Course Manager cannot access payment records • All server responses include standard security headers (including HSTS, X-Frame-Options, and MIME-type protection) to guard against common web attacks • We do not sell, share, or disclose your personal information to any third parties • Access to the admin panel is restricted to authorised ZITMAP Tutorials staff only, each accountable for actions taken under their own account 5. COOKIES & SESSION DATA This portal does not use third-party tracking or advertising cookies. Your sign-in session is maintained using a security token rather than a tracking cookie, and is only used to keep you signed in and to identify which account is making a request. 6. YOUR RIGHTS As a student user, you have the right to: • Request a copy of your personal data held by ZITMAP Tutorials • Request correction of any inaccurate personal information • Request deletion of your account and associated data • Contact the administrator at any time with privacy concerns, via the Contact Us page 7. CHILDREN & MINORS ZITMAP Tutorials serves students in higher and further education. Users under the age of 18 must have parental or guardian consent before creating an account. 8. DATA BREACH NOTIFICATION In the unlikely event of a data breach affecting your personal information, ZITMAP Tutorials will notify affected users and relevant authorities as required, without undue delay, and will describe the nature of the breach and the steps being taken in response. 9. CHANGES TO THIS POLICY We may update this Privacy & Security Policy from time to time as the portal's features and safeguards evolve. Any changes will be published on this page and students will be notified through the portal announcements. 10. CONTACT For any privacy or security concerns, please contact the ZITMAP Tutorials administration team through the Contact Us page of this portal. By using ZITMAP Tutorials, you agree to the terms of this Privacy & Security Policy.

    📷 Change

    Upload a PNG or WebP image with a transparent background for the portal logo. Minimum size: 300 × 300 px. Images smaller than 300 × 300 px will be declined. The logo will be saved as a transparent 300 × 300 PNG and displayed in the sidebar and on all login/register screens — no white box or background will appear around it.

    ✅ Custom logo active (300 × 300 px, transparent background).

    📱 Auth Card Dimensions by Device

    Control Login / Register / Forgot Password card sizes per device

    Set custom max-width and padding values for the login, create account, and forgot password cards on each device type. Changes apply live for users on those devices — detected automatically by screen width. Click Save All Device Sizes to persist.
